## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1)

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 92.5%, very close than the 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 92.4%. With regard to the 7.5% of flights that did not adhere, 3.8% were early and 3.7% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
